title: AIIMS Nagpur Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 32 Posts
organization: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur)
short_info: The latest All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Junior Resident (Non-Academic) posts! Published under Advertisement No. AIIMS-NGP/Admin-I/Rect./JR/2026/01 at AIIMS Nagpur Official Website, this new recruitment drive offers 32 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the maximum 30 years age group and possessing MBBS (including completion of Internship) or equivalent degree recognized by NMC/State Registration can apply online from 15-05-2026 to 29-05-2026. Find all details about the AIIMS Nagpur Junior Resident (Non-A

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years, OBC: 3 years, PwD: 10 years (General), 13 years (OBC), 15 years (SC/ST)

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS (including completion of Internship) or equivalent degree recognized by NMC/State Registration
qualification.details: MBBS (including completion of Internship) or equivalent degree recognized by NMC/State Registration

salary_details.details: Rs. 56,100/- (Level-10, Cell No. 01 as per 7th CPC) plus usual allowances including NPA (if applicable)

selection_process: MCQ-based Written Test Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Nagpur Junior Resident (Non-Academic) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Nagpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Nagpur Junior Resident (Non-Academic) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form is 29th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released for Junior Resident posts?
faq.answer: AIIMS Nagpur has released a total of 32 vacancies for the Junior Resident (Non-Academic) positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is MBBS (including completion of Internship) or an equivalent degree recognized by the NMC/State Registration.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Resident (Non-Academic) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Resident (Non-Academic) post is 30 years, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Resident (Non-Academic) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 56,100/- per month, along with usual allowances including NPA.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the AIIMS Nagpur Junior Resident (Non-Academic) recruitment?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official AIIMS Nagpur website or the direct application link provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q7. Is there an application fee for the Junior Resident (Non-Academic) post?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 500/-, SC/ST candidates need to pay Rs. 250/-, and PwBD candidates are exempted.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes an MCQ-based Written Test, followed by an Interview, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this AIIMS Nagpur recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Official Notification PDF" link in the Important Links section of this article.
